step_rationale: Steroid metabolite; systemic cardioprotective marker; off-pathway.
mechanism: Testosterone isobutyrate is a steroid metabolite associated with coronary artery disease risk and systemic metabolic dysregulation.

references.title: Plasma Metabolic Profiling and Multiclass Diagnostic Model Development for Stable Angina Pectoris and Acute Myocardial Infarction.
